summary: Velion AI Assistant Phase 2 - Iteration 135. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified. Phase 2 features working: Dynamic message variants (TRIGGER_VARIANTS with 4+ messages per type), Page-contextual suggestions (PAGE_SUGGESTIONS for /, /infrastructure, /create-film, /films, /hq, /festivals), Priority-based bubble styling (high=cyan-400, medium=cyan-500, low=white/10), Page-aware polling with 12s delay on navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: velion.py: TRIGGER_VARIANTS dict has 4+ message variants for each trigger type (revenue, stuck_film, countdown, pvp_event, no_films, low_quality)
velion.py: PAGE_SUGGESTIONS dict provides contextual hints for 9 pages with base messages and level-specific messages
velion.py: pick_variant() uses random.choice for dynamic message selection with template variable substitution
velion.py: get_page_suggestion() finds best matching route and selects level-appropriate message
velion.py: page query param on /player-status endpoint triggers page_hint generation
VelionOverlay.jsx: useLocation() tracks current page, passes to fetchTriggers
VelionOverlay.jsx: PAGE_HINT_DELAY=12000ms for page navigation re-fetch
VelionOverlay.jsx: Priority-based bubble styling correctly implemented (high=cyan-400/40, medium=cyan-500/30, low=white/10)
VelionPanel.jsx: Two tabs (Tutorial + Chat) with proper data-testid attributes
VelionPanel.jsx: Tutorial has 16 steps with navigation (Avanti/Indietro/Salta)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with stuck film 'Il Grande Mistero'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion Phase 2 fully verified. Key findings: 1) Backend TRIGGER_VARIANTS has 4+ messages per trigger type using random.choice. 2) PAGE_SUGGESTIONS provides contextual hints for 9 pages (/, /infrastructure, /create-film, /films, /hq, /festivals, /marketplace, /series, /anime). 3) page query param on /api/velion/player-status returns page_hint with type='page_context' and priority='low'. 4) Frontend VelionOverlay passes current page via useLocation() to API. 5) PAGE_HINT_DELAY=12s on navigation before showing page hint. 6) Bubble styling: high priority=cyan-400 border, medium=cyan-500 border, low=white/10 border. 7) Test user has stuck film 'Il Grande Mistero' which triggers stuck_film message (medium priority). 8) Daily bonus popup may appear after login - close with 'Riscuoti' button.

bubble_notification.observed_message: Hai un progetto in pausa: "Il Grande Mistero". Il cinema non aspetta.
